MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, WAI MAN

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT LAU AND POON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 08/27/04. RULING: DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT GU WAS NOT A PARTY TO THIS MOTION AND AS THE 1ST, 2ND AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUBJECT TO ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE AND BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS, THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS STRICKEN AS TO GU AS WELL. DEFENDANTS, AS THE PREVAILING PARTY, ARE ENTITLED TO SUBMIT A REQUEST FOR FEES PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16(C). PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT IS DENIED. HON. JAMES L. WARREN; COURT REPORTER PATTY HUBBLE CSR 3058

Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Oct-18-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT HENRY LAU AND SIU POON'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees: GRANTED in the amount of $3,525.000 fees and $614.70 costs for a total of $4,139.70. Fees are not awarded for preparation of the motion for attorney fees. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James B. Kraus, Esq., and Sue Ma, Esq., Law Offices of Andrew M. Zacks (415) 956-8100 for Defendant and Moving Party Lau
Richard Hurlburt, Esq. (415) 391-6496 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Chan
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT HENRY LAU AND SIU POON MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT: GRANTED; however, the Court takes UNDER SUBMISSION the issue of "with leave to amend" and the prevailing party. Counsel shall submit proposed forms of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Patty Hubble, CSR #3508
